    • filter

      protected <G extends ProofGoal<@NonNull G>> boolean filter(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, G goal, MutableState mState)
      Description copied from class: BinaryFeature
      Compute whether the result of the feature is zero (true) or infinity (false)
      Specified by:
      filter in class BinaryFeature
      Parameters:
      app - the RuleApp
      pos - position where app is to be applied
      goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
      mState - mutable state needed for feature computation
      Returns:
      true iff the result of the feature is supposed to be zero.
